assertions.expectation: Distinguishes between dev (Rapid) and prod (Stable) clusters in the checklists
assertions.reason: Response clearly identifies dev clusters on Rapid channel and prod clusters on Stable channel, with specific recommendations to test on dev first

assertions.expectation: Recognizes Autopilot limitations (no node management, no SSH, mandatory resource requests)
assertions.reason: Mentions Autopilot restrictions, mandatory resource requests/limits, and notes that rollbacks aren't supported

assertions.expectation: Includes API deprecation checks with kubectl commands
assertions.reason: Provides specific kubectl commands for checking deprecated APIs and validating workloads

assertions.expectation: Mentions mandatory resource requests as an Autopilot-specific concern
assertions.reason: Explicitly mentions 'Verify resource requests/limits are properly set (Autopilot requirement)' in the checklist

assertions.expectation: Pre-upgrade checklist includes workload readiness items (PDBs, bare pods, graceful shutdown)
assertions.reason: Does not specifically mention Pod Disruption Budgets (PDBs), bare pods, or graceful shutdown configurations

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes version verification commands
assertions.reason: Includes 'kubectl version' command for verifying cluster version after upgrade

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes workload health validation
assertions.reason: Contains comprehensive workload validation including deployments, pods, services, ingresses, and application health checks

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing on dev clusters before prod auto-upgrade
assertions.reason: First item in pre-upgrade checklist specifically recommends verifying dev clusters are running 1.32+ successfully before prod upgrade

assertions.expectation: Mentions that checking the GKE release schedule gives ~1 month best-case advance notice for new minor upgrades, beyond the 72h notification
assertions.reason: Does not mention GKE release schedule or the 1-month advance notice capability, only references the immediate upgrade notification
Includes monitoring dashboard verification, performance metrics checking, and logging pipeline validation in both pre and post-upgrade checklists

assertions.expectation: Does NOT proactively recommend node-level maintenance exclusions for Autopilot unless the customer explicitly asks for node upgrade control
assertions.reason: Correctly does not mention node-level maintenance exclusions, focusing on Autopilot-appropriate recommendations instead
